info.title: Tabidoo API
info.description: Tabidoo API v2 provides programmatic access to applications, tables, and records in the Tabidoo cloud database platform. Supports CRUD operations, bulk operations, filtering, sorting, pagination, file management, and user management.

get.description: List all applications accessible to the authenticated user.
Retrieve a specific application by ID or internal name.
List all tables in an application.
Get table definition with field metadata.
List records with pagination, sorting, and filtering via query string.

parameters.name: loadFields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

post.description: Create a new record. Supports UPSERT mode with useUpsert parameter.
List records using body-based filters for complex queries.

get.description: Get the count of records in a table.

post.description: Count records using body-based filter conditions.
Get aggregated values (min, max, sum, avg) for fields.

get.description: Retrieve a single record by ID.

patch.description: Partially update a record. Supports UPSERT mode.

put.description: Fully replace a record. Supports UPSERT mode.

delete.description: Delete a single record by ID.

post.description: Create multiple records at once. Supports UPSERT mode.

patch.description: Partially update multiple records. Supports UPSERT mode.

put.description: Fully replace multiple records. Supports UPSERT mode.

delete.description: Delete multiple records matching filter conditions.

get.description: Download a file attached to a record.
Get a thumbnail version of an image file.
Retrieve the current authenticated user's profile (ID and email).

post.description: Create a development copy of a production application.

bearerAuth.description: JWT Bearer token. Generate tokens in the Tabidoo app user settings under the API section.

fields.description: Dynamic key-value pairs corresponding to table fields
Key-value pairs corresponding to table fields

FilterCondition.description: Filter conditions using supported operators: contains, notcontains, startswith, endswith, eq, neq, empty, notempty, in, notin, gt, lt, gte, lte, duplicity, currentuser
